misconceptions.correction: facts and unoriginal compilations are not protected

misconceptions.wrong_move: assumes effort or expense earns protection (sweat of the brow)
misconceptions.correction: originality, not labor, is the constitutional touchstone of copyright

elements.name: Copying of original protected elements
is_met_when: access plus substantial similarity of protected expression
fails_when: only ideas or unprotectable elements are shared

misconceptions.correction: similarity in unprotected ideas or facts is not infringement

misconceptions.wrong_move: infers copying from resemblance with no access shown
misconceptions.correction: without access, even striking similarity can be independent creation

teaching_targets.intended_lesson: no valid copyright means no infringement even when copying is obvious
independent creation defeats infringement even when the works look alike
all elements satisfied, the claim stands
